<!-- Generated by dart run tool/visibility/generate_visibility.dart. Edit tool/visibility/visibility_manifest.json instead. -->
# Developer AI Guidance For pqforge

Use this file when an AI coding agent needs scoped pqforge context.

## Core Rule

pqforge is an application composition package. Keep claims scoped to composition around pqcrypto; do not claim validation or certification.

## Recipe Surfaces

- Local File Vault: encryptFileBytes, decryptFileBytes, PqEnvelope
- Folder Archive: encryptFolderEntry, decryptFolderEntry
- Text Snippets: sealText, openText, signText, verifyText
- Media Assets: sealMedia, openMedia, signMedia, verifyMedia
- Document Signing: signDocument, verifyDocument
- Webhook Integrity: signWebhook, verifyWebhook
- Signed Tokens: issueToken, verifyToken
- Private Email Payloads: sealEmail, openEmail
- Government And Medical Records: encryptRecord, appendSignedLogEntry
- Software Artifacts: signArtifact, verifyArtifact
- Hybrid Server Sessions: PqForgeHybridKeyAgreement, PqForgeSecureSession

## Required Verification

- `dart run tool/visibility/generate_visibility.dart --check`
- `dart format --output=none --set-exit-if-changed .`
- `dart analyze`
- `dart test`
- `dart run example/pqforge_example.dart`
- `dart run example/catalog_recipes_example.dart`
- `dart run example/hybrid_key_agreement_example.dart`
- `dart pub publish --dry-run`
